# easyPhoto — llms-full.txt
# Machine-readable product and provenance overview.
# Source: https://easyphoto.in/ | Updated: 2026-07-18

## About

easyPhoto is a free, privacy-first web app for preparing passport and visa photos,
exam photos and signatures, images, and PDFs. Tools apply user-selected targets and
published dimensions where the linked source provides them. Requirements can change,
so visitors should confirm the current authority or application-portal instructions
before submitting. A tool result does not guarantee an authority's decision.

## Current specification index

The registry-generated compact index is the current machine-readable source for exam
and document-photo presets:

https://easyphoto.in/llms.txt

Each exam page shows the recorded requirements, named source, verification status, and
review context. Presets marked needs-review disclose that the current figures must be
confirmed on the application portal:

https://easyphoto.in/exam-requirements/

This file intentionally does not duplicate per-portal numbers. Keeping those values in
the registry-derived index prevents a second static table from becoming stale.

## Key tools

- Passport and visa photo maker: https://easyphoto.in/passport-photo/
- Exam Application Kit: https://easyphoto.in/tools/exam-package/
- Exam requirements and provenance: https://easyphoto.in/exam-requirements/
- Resize to a selected KB target: https://easyphoto.in/tools/resize-kb/
- Resize to selected pixel dimensions: https://easyphoto.in/tools/resize-dimensions/
- Signature tools: https://easyphoto.in/tools/signature/
- PDF tools: https://easyphoto.in/tools/pdf/
- All tools: https://easyphoto.in/tools/

## Privacy

Image, signature, and PDF processing runs in the user's browser. Files are not uploaded
to easyPhoto's servers, no account is required, and downloaded outputs have no added
watermark.

## Trust and methodology

- Editorial policy: https://easyphoto.in/editorial-policy/
- Source methodology: https://easyphoto.in/source-methodology/
- How photo checking works: https://easyphoto.in/how-photo-checking-works/
- Corrections policy: https://easyphoto.in/corrections-policy/
- Contact: https://easyphoto.in/contact/

## Sitemap

https://easyphoto.in/sitemap.xml
